response.step_by_step_log: Identified song 'W/X/Y' by Tani Yuuki performed by Kazama Iroha. Searched for '"W/X/Y" Tani Yuuki Japanese and English lyrics'. Found lyrics and mapped to the first scene. Remaining scenes consist of dialogue and merchandise presentation, which do not contain vocal music.
response.global_summary: VTuber Kazama Iroha performs a cover of 'W/X/Y' by Tani Yuuki, followed by a birthday merchandise presentation.

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha performs a cover of 'W/X/Y'. The song title appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
垂れ流したテレビの音
溜めてしまった洗濯物は今日こそ
晴れでもあえて外には出ないでいよう
映えないスナックとアルコールで乾杯を
愛を伝えたいのですよ
これからも僕が支えてくって
呆れてしまうくらいにね
愛が増していく day by day
面と向かうとどうしても
素直になれないな、ごめんね
戯れる Slowly flowing
愛してるも通り越して
似た者同士こうして
年老いるまで笑っていたいね
君がいなきゃ lonely lonely day
夢の中 fall asleep
起こすから morning callで
I protect you from nightmares, Baby
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The sound of the TV left on
The laundry I've put off, today's the day
Even if it's sunny, I dare to stay inside
Let's not go out
A toast with un-Instagrammable snacks and alcohol
I want to tell you I love you
That I'll support you from now on
To the point you'll be dumbfounded, right?
Love increases day by day
When we face each other, I can't be honest somehow
I'm sorry
Playing around, slowly flowing
Even beyond saying 'I love you'
Two of a kind, like this
I want to be laughing until we grow old
If you're not here, it's a lonely, lonely day
In a dream, fall asleep
I'll wake you up with a morning call
I protect you from nightmares, Baby

scenes.description: Dialogue and merchandise presentation for Kazama Iroha's 2025 birthday.
